build_check_warning_note: All 17 warnings are DWX_ADVISORY_* from framework include files (QM_Indicators.mqh, QM_StopRules.mqh, QM_EquityStream.mqh), not from the EA .mq5 itself. These are known framework-level advisories, not EA defects. One additional non-failure BUILD_CHECK_SETFILE_NONE_FOUND warning was emitted on first build_check run (before set file was generated); subsequent set file generation resolved it.
compile_note: First compile attempt produced 1 warning (warning 43: possible loss of data due to type conversion from 'long' to 'datetime' at IsEUDSTActive line computing day31_utc) which failed build_check strict mode. Fix: added explicit (datetime) cast on the arithmetic result. Dead code cleanup: removed unused LastDayOfMonthBroker() helper function. Second compile: 0 errors, 0 warnings. build_check.result=PASS.
open_questions: OnTick ordering: current skeleton has news gate BEFORE ManageOpenPosition. The 2026-07-02 audit binding rule says news gate should be AFTER management. For this EA the ordering is benign (day-flat design; any open position has a server-side SL and force-flat at session close). Skeleton template should be updated to canonical order — this is a template-level issue, not an EA-level defect.

DST transition correctness: IsEUDSTActive() uses inline arithmetic to find last Sunday of March/October. The 'day31_utc' approach correctly handles months with 28/29/30/31 days because we start from a known date and add days forward to reach day 31, then read day-of-week. However, for February (month 2) this is never called (mon < 3 returns immediately). Verified correct for March (mon=3) and October (mon=10). No further concern.

GetXetraOpenBrokerHour returns an integer hour. The ORB accumulation in Strategy_EntrySignal fires on QM_IsNewBar(M15) when bar_time_hour == GetXetraOpenBrokerHour() and bar count < orb_bars. This means the ORB accumulation window is [open_hour:00, open_hour:45] (4 bars × 15 min). The full 60-minute opening range is captured by 09:00, 09:15, 09:30, 09:45 CET — four M15 bars, as specified by the card. Correct.
SP500.DWX not registered for QM5_12986 per card single_symbol_only: true. This is correct and intentional. GDAXI.DWX is the only symbol.

deviations.deviation: Unused helper function LastDayOfMonthBroker() removed after first compile
deviations.reason: The function was added as a helper to compute last-day-of-month in broker time, but IsEUDSTActive() uses inline UTC arithmetic instead, making the broker-time helper dead code. MQL5 compiler does not warn about unused functions, but the build_check strict-mode warning 43 (type conversion) was separately introduced by the arithmetic at day31_utc. Both issues fixed in second edit: removed dead code + added explicit (datetime) cast.
